user.objective: As an aspiring full-stack engineer, I possess a strong passion for continuously expanding my knowledge and skills in both front-end and back-end development. I am wholeheartedly committed to staying abreast of the latest technologies and best practices in the field. My goal is not only to excel as an individual developer but also to thrive in collaborative environments. Ultimately, I aspire to leverage my expertise to create innovative and user-friendly applications capable of solving real-world problems.

details: Developed automation test scripts for Dolby Vision TV SDK for quick and error free verification
Extract and analyzed data to help the team evaluate the best approach when developing tests
Utilized team development tools such as Git to keep team up to date and code organized
Developed API for communication between Python and required test tools for testing
Created new tests for increased test coverage

project.name: YesNo
details: A simple and modern survey tools that enables users to find out whether people like or dislike something
Built on a NextJS framework with data maintained on Planetscale MySQL
Implemented AWS to allow easier image hosting through S3 Buckets

project.name: unBounded
details: Developed a fully functional ecommerce website using HTML\CSS frontend and Node JS backend
Hosted application on a Synology NAS with data stored and retreived from Mongo Atlas
Integrated Paypal API, enabling user transactions

project.name: Test Automation for Dolby TV and Monitor SDK
details: Integrated automated audio and video sync test to Dolby TV and Monitor SDK with intent of shipping to customers
Developed M41H (test tool) capture and verification automation that sped up data extraction and analysis
Integrated Paypal API, enabling user transactions
